summary: Comprehensive testing of N+1 optimizations and bug fixes for Jam Connexion. Backend: 16/16 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Login, Connexions display, and Venue dashboard verified working. Fixed a Pydantic model issue where ConcertEventResponse required venue_name and start_time but older DB records lacked these fields.

minor.issue: ConcertEventResponse had required fields (venue_name, start_time) that weren't present in older DB concert records - FIXED by adding defaults

passed_tests: Backend: /api/my-subscriptions - Returns enriched venue data (venue_name, city, venue_image)
Backend: /api/friends - Returns enriched friend data (pseudo, city, profile_id)
Backend: /api/friends/requests - Returns enriched sender data (from_user_name, from_user_city, from_user_image)
Backend: /api/friends/sent - Returns enriched recipient data (pseudo, city, profile_image)
Backend: /api/concerts - Returns list with participants_count (after fix)
Backend: All friendship endpoints require authentication
Backend: MongoDB _id excluded from API responses
Frontend: Musician login via /auth page works
Frontend: Connexions tab displays venue names correctly ('Bar Refactored', 'Test Concert Date Venue')
Frontend: Connexions tab displays city information ('Paris')
Frontend: Venue Planning tab loads calendar view
Frontend: Polling mechanism (15s) implemented for real-time updates
critical_code_review_comments: N+1 optimizations use MongoDB $lookup aggregation pipelines - efficient single-query approach
Service Worker v4.0 correctly excludes critical endpoints (/api/my-subscriptions, /api/friends/*) from caching
15-second polling interval implemented in VenueDashboard for real-time participant updates
updated_files: /app/backend/models/event.py - Fixed ConcertEventResponse defaults for venue_name and start_time
/app/backend/tests/test_n_plus_1_optimizations.py - Created comprehensive test suite for optimized endpoints
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test accounts
context_for_next_testing_agent: N+1 optimizations verified working for 6 endpoints. Service Worker v4.0 deployed with NO_CACHE_ENDPOINTS for critical data. 15-second polling implemented for real-time participant updates. ConcertEventResponse model fixed with defaults for backward compatibility. All backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_n_plus_1_optimizations.py

n_plus_1_optimizations./api/my-subscriptions: Working - venue_name, city, venue_image enriched via $lookup
n_plus_1_optimizations./api/friends: Working - friend data enriched via aggregation
n_plus_1_optimizations./api/friends/requests: Working - sender data enriched via aggregation
n_plus_1_optimizations./api/friends/sent: Working - recipient data enriched via aggregation

connexions_display_bug.verification: Venue names and cities displayed correctly in Connexions tab
connexions_display_bug.screenshot: 'Bar Refactored' and 'Test Concert Date Venue' with 'Paris' visible

bug_fixed_this_session.issue: ConcertEventResponse Pydantic validation error for older DB records missing venue_name and start_time
bug_fixed_this_session.fix: Added default values: venue_name = '' and start_time = ''
bug_fixed_this_session.verification: GET /api/concerts now returns 200 with all concert data including older records
